proxies.name: BM25-raw-topk (baseline)
proxies.description: Classic lexical retrieval over raw chunks with fixed budget=12

proxies.name: Compressed+GraphRAG+AdaptiveBudget (after)
proxies.description: Compressed chunk summaries, dependency expansion, uncertainty-driven budget

proxies.name: FixedBudget-GraphRAG proxy
proxies.description: Ablation proxy approximated by using after metrics but median adaptive budget
proxies.note: Direct competitor frameworks not executed in this host; proxy supports relative framing.
